title: elsholtzia pseudocristata var. saxatilis
intro: Elsholtzia pseudocristata var. saxatilis, commonly known as the Rock Mountain Elsholtzia or Elsholtzia, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Elsholtzia pseudocristata var. saxatilis include reducing fever, relieving cold and flu symptoms, and improving respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Elsholtzia pseudocristata var. saxatilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
